author: doll-agent
content: Added fit_predict() to all 13 unsupervised clustering estimators: KMeans, MiniBatchKMeans, BisectingKMeans, MeanShift, GaussianMixture, BayesianGaussianMixture (each delegates to fit + predict), DBSCAN, OPTICS, AgglomerativeClustering, Hdbscan, Birch, AffinityPropagation, SpectralClustering (each delegates to fit + labels().clone()). All label-only fitted structs already had labels() accessors so no labels-side work needed. All 332 tests pass.
